question_overrides.pattern: are you willing to complete a background check?
hear about us
how did you hear about
pronouns?
bound by any agreements with a current or former employer
this is your moment to wow us! note: answering this question fully is the most important part of our interview process. first example
question_overrides.answer: Built an agentic document extraction pipeline that ingests ESG data from more than 1,000 company reports using a LangChain orchestrator, fine-tuned vision-language models, OCR models, and PyTorch workflows. Designed the evaluation approach with custom datasets, Phoenix instrumentation, and OpenTelemetry traces to compare system versions rigorously. Improved extraction precision from 50% in the initial zero-shot system to 80% in the production RAG-based pipeline.

question_overrides.pattern: this is your moment to wow us! note: answering this question fully is the most important part of our interview process. second example
question_overrides.answer: Reduced average pipeline runtime by 50% while supporting Baker Hughes by optimizing Spark workloads, removing bottlenecks, and streamlining configuration across production data pipelines. The improvement materially increased system reliability and cut SLA breaches by 75%. This work required analyzing failure patterns in complex distributed jobs and turning that analysis into measurable production improvements.

question_overrides.pattern: second example:
question_overrides.answer: Reduced average pipeline runtime by 50% while supporting Baker Hughes by optimizing Spark workloads, removing bottlenecks, and streamlining configuration across production data pipelines. The improvement materially increased system reliability and cut SLA breaches by 75%. This work required analyzing failure patterns in complex distributed jobs and turning that analysis into measurable production improvements.

question_overrides.pattern: this is your moment to wow us! note: answering this question fully is the most important part of our interview process. third example
question_overrides.answer: Led the migration of high-volume data pipelines from AWS Athena to Delta Lake on Apache Spark and Databricks for Uptake, delivering a 10x reduction in query latency and about $100,000 in annualized savings. In the same environment, I built and maintained ETL pipelines processing more than 10 GB of IoT telemetry daily from over 20,000 vehicles. I also implemented data quality controls to prevent erroneous records from reaching production ML and analytics workloads.

question_overrides.pattern: background check
comfortable working in a remote setting
what is a piece of software or tech gadget you couldn't live without
question_overrides.answer: pdb. I really appreciate how easy it makes debugging software compared with many other languages and ecosystems, where inspecting state and stepping through execution is often more cumbersome.
